error.title: Workfile name not allowed
error.description:
This workfile version name uses characters AYON cannot publish.
Published name: ``{product_name}``
Suggested name for a new save: ``{sanitized}``
**Fix Workfile Name** saves a new version with a corrected name, then publish again.
Or open **Workfiles → Save As** and enter a valid version name (invalid names are blocked there).
error.detail: **Fix Workfile Name** creates a new workfile version on disk with a valid name. Your current file is not renamed in place.
